title: Mace PVP Breach x Density
description: This resource pack gives two different textures for Breach and Density mace.
body:
## A Resource pack for Mace pvp
This resource pack gives you 3 different **animated** mace textures for unechanted mace, Density mace and Breach mace

**No Optifine or CIT needed**

Make your Experience better with [ThunderStrikes Shadows](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/thunderstrikes-mace-pvp-pack) Mace pvp pack.

### Density mace
![Density Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acbfd8b39f446d0ff69b1fb51dd2a57440fdc5b6.png)

### Breach Mace
![Breach Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a233891b2ae41c3ca80b491c9ed4d8141ea22f4f.png)
